items.raw_desc: Szintetizátor gyerekeknek Baby Einstein Fa zongora Cal's First Melodies Magic Touch Hape:The Baby Einstein Magic Touch baby grand piano works with the principles of motessori pedagogy and is the ideal gateway to the world of music for children as young as six months. The innovative wooden piano keys do not work in the classic way, but respond to the mere touch of warm fingers. There are four different sounds to choose from, two instruments (piano, vibraphone) and two animal sounds (dog, cat). The Baby Einstein Magic Touch piano comes with three double-sided cards, which feature melodies that are easy to play thanks to the colourful connection to the keys. The blue button offers the possibility to play six preset melodies. The piano speaker excels in quality and you can adjust the volume. Cleaning the piano is easy, just wipe it down. The Baby Einstein Magic Touch piano runs on three AA batteries, but these are not included.
